title: marina minor
intro: Marina minor, also known as Sea Holly or Eryngium maritimum, is a perennial plant native to coastal areas in Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Marina minor include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, while its extracts have also been shown to have antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Marina minor include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system, reduce pain, and promote overall well-being.
